caption: A man with short, styled brown hair and light stubble is recording in a studio against a dark grey, vertically-ribbed acoustic foam wall. He wears large black over-ear headphones and a black long-sleeved garment. A professional condenser microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of his face. Initially, the man has his eyes closed and his right arm raised with a clenched fist. He then opens his eyes and looks toward his left, extending his right arm and opening his hand with fingers splayed. He continues to look to his left while gesturing with his hand, and finally, he shifts his gaze forward toward the microphone while maintaining the hand gesture. The camera angle remains static throughout the sequence, focusing on the man from the chest up.
